subject: MAXI GRB210709.93: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs  <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:
V. Lipunov, E. Gorbovskoy, V.Kornilov, N.Tyurina, P.Balanutsa, A.Kuznetsov, F.Balakin, 
V.Vladimirov, D. Vlasenko, I.Gorbunov, D.Zimnukhov, V.Senik, T.Pogrosheva,
D.Kuvshinov,  D. Cheryasov
(Lomonosov Moscow State University, SAI, Physics Department),

R. Podesta, C.Lopez, F. Podesta, C.Francile 
(Observatorio Astronomico Felix Aguilar OAFA),

R. Rebolo, M. Serra 
(The Instituto de Astrofisica de Canarias),

D. Buckley 
(South African Astronomical Observatory),

O.A. Gres, N.M. Budnev, O.Ershova 
(Irkutsk State University, API),

A. Tlatov, D. Dormidontov 
(Kislovodsk Solar Station of the Pulkovo Observatory),

V. Yurkov, A. Gabovich, Yu. Sergienko 
(Blagoveschensk Educational State University)




MASTER-SAAO robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in South Africa (South African Astronomical Observatory) started inspect of the MAXI GRB210709.93 (trigger No 404728808,18h 49m 35.04s , -23d 47m 09.6s, R=1) errorbox  22 sec after notice time and 9031 sec after trigger time at 2021-07-10 00:43:14 UT, with upper limit up to  17.2 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 33 deg. The sun  altitude  is -61.9 deg. 

MASTER-OAFA robotic telescope  located in Argentina (OAFA observatory of San Juan National University) started inspect of the MAXI GRB210709.93 errorbox  65 sec after notice time and 9074 sec after trigger time at 2021-07-10 00:43:57 UT, with upper limit up to  17.8 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 45 deg. The sun  altitude  is -37.1 deg. 

MASTER-IAC robotic telescope  located in Spain (IAC Teide Observatory) started inspect of the MAXI GRB210709.93 errorbox  221 sec after notice time and 9230 sec after trigger time at 2021-07-10 00:46:33 UT, with upper limit up to  17.9 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 52 deg. The sun  altitude  is -39.5 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = -11 deg., longitude l = 12 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=1656741

We obtain a following upper limits.
